{{CargoOrgan
|name=Reverse Scale of Fate
|type=Bionic
|rank=orange
|id=10685
|idx=43
|description="Every dragon bears a reverse scale — a hidden wheel of destiny unique to its soul. When that scale emerges, fate itself begins to turn."
— Codex Draconis
|skill=When receiving fatal damage, ignore death this round and restore 7.2% of Max HP!
|hp=1872
|def=184
|atk=291
|rush=183
|gene1=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +6%
|gene2=In exploration, 6% chance to obtain 2x Reagents
|gene3=In explorations, 6% chance to gain 2x INTEL
|gene4=In explorations, 2x Time Chest Drops +6%
|gene5=In exploration, 6% chance to gain 2x Treasure Maps
|gene7=In explorations, 2x B-tad Drops +6% (Awakened)
|}}
